text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ahem... Please forget you heard that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
First place is to be expected. I am a member of
the Mejiro family, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is much too early to celebrate. I have yet to
achieve my task.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can't let the fact that I got first place...
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: You did it! You really did it!
You did it! You really did it!
Let's aim for even greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: You did it! You really did it!
You did it! You really did it!
Let's aim for even greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't have to be so loud! Aren't you a little too happy?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This really is not the time to lose focus. You really
are hopeless sometimes... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if you get so excited over every little
thing, you'll wear yourself out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
There are still a number of victories in waiting
that will be worthy of celebration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course. And it seems you're plenty
prepared for what's to come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This win is but a single checkpoint on the road to
my next goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will climb even higher! I will be more beautiful,
more graceful, and even more perfect!
